canto_title: The Chaos and Combat of the Malebranche

scenes.summary: Dante recalls seeing armies and fleets moving in the world of the living.
Dante describes the company of demons and his intent to observe the behavior of the sinners.
Dante uses similes of dolphins and frogs to describe how the sinners attempt to hide themselves in the pitch.
The arrival of Barbariccia causes Graffiacan to react violently, moving like an otter.
Dante notes that he already knows the names of all the sinners because he observed their election.
The demons demand to use hooks to skin the prisoners, and Dante asks Virgil to identify the victim.
The prisoner explains his birth in Navarre and his history of fraudulent behavior.
The demon Cirïatto reacts with a pig-like snorting sound.
Barbariccia orders the other demons to stand back so he can attack the prisoner.
Virgil asks the prisoner if he knows any Italians in the pitch, and the prisoner replies that he does.
The demons begin attacking the prisoners with hooks, causing a frantic scramble.
Virgil asks the prisoner about the person responsible for his current misfortune.
The prisoner identifies Friar Gomita of Gallura as a corrupt official.
The prisoner points out another sinner who is grimacing at him.
Barbariccia directs a command toward the demon Farfarello.
The prisoner offers to bring more sinners into the pit if the demons wait for a moment.
The demon Cagnazzo criticizes the prisoner’s attempt to use malice for his own advantage.
The demon Alichin threatens to fly over the pitch and challenges the prisoner's importance.
All the demons turn their eyes toward one another in anticipation of a fight.
The Navarrese prisoner suddenly jumps, causing the group to break apart.
The movement causes some demons to dive into the pitch and others to struggle upward.
Calcabrina attempts to chase the others but becomes trapped with his companion.
The demons fall into the center of the boiling pitch and find themselves unable to escape.
Barbariccia and his companions move away, leaving the victims stuck and partially cooked in the pitch.
